name: Legends of Chamberlain Heights
overview: An urban animated series mixing raucous comedy and social commentary that centers on three high school freshman basketball benchwarmers: Jamal, Grover, and Milk. The three friends tackle life with some wins and some losses, but failure doesn’t faze them since they're legends...even if it’s just in their own minds.

trailers.title: Legends of Chamberlain Heights - Legends in Training
